calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-14-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:25am
Judge Pro Tem Robert Stumpf, clerk Jean Kong, D525, not reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
Appellant, M & N Auto Sales appears by Johnny Pour, owner; Respondent, AutoReturn appears by Dan Scanlan, manager. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Stumpf.

9:50am
Matter is submitted. No evidence presented in Court.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-14-2014 Judgment Entered
